race.comment: BIT OF SHOOSH (16) just missed at Mornington and then was heavily backed and recorded an effortless win with this track/trip in this grade. Has an awkward gate and 2kg more, but with average luck can go back-to-back for a top barn. SARA'S ROCKET (11) led and found one runner 2L too good over 1715m at Geelong. Peak and will push forward. Rates to go close. PENDANTE (13) resumed here over 1400m and just missed. Keeps the 1.5kg claim and hasn't missed a beat. She should enjoy a soft run and the extra metres suit. BEARBRASSBLACKFISH (8) was threatening a win before settling back from a wide gate here over 2000m, doing nothing. Has jumped out satisfactorily since, as required by the steward, switching back to 1600m should suit. Has an outside gate, but should be running into it.
